reasoning: The Albanian name 'Bashkia e qytetit' corresponds to 'City Hall'. The clue 'Bashkia e qytetit është ndërmjet kishës dhe xhamisë' (City Hall is between the Church (F) and the Mosque (L)) is true on the map (F-G-L).

The Albanian name 'Dhëmbëtar' corresponds to 'Dentist'. The clue 'Dhëmbëtari është majtas nga floktorit dhe para xhamisë' (Dentist is to the left of the Barbershop (B) and in front of the Mosque (L)). Dentist (H) is indeed in front of Mosque (L) (H is below L). However, Dentist (H) is to the right of Barbershop (B) (D-B-H), which contradicts 'majtas nga floktorit'. Despite this contradiction, given the overall problem structure, 'Dhëmbëtar' is intended to be 'Dentist (H)'.

The Albanian name 'Ëmbëlsirë' corresponds to 'Confectionery'. This place is mentioned in clues for 'Mishtorja' (Butcher (C) is behind Confectionery (J) - C is to the left of J) and 'Sheshi lojërash' (Playground (N) is to the right of Confectionery (J)). Both are consistent with J being Confectionery.

The Albanian name 'Furrë' corresponds to 'Bakery'. It is mentioned in the clue for 'Kafeneja': 'Kafeneja (D) është ndërmjet kishës (F) dhe furrës (A)' (Cafe is between Church and Bakery). This vertical alignment (F above D, D above A) is consistent on the map.

The Albanian name 'Kafene' corresponds to 'Cafe'. The clue 'Kafeneja është ndërmjet kishës (F) dhe furrës (A) dhe majtas nga dhëmbëtarit (H)' (Cafe is between Church and Bakery, and to the left of Dentist). Cafe (D) is vertically between F and A, and is to the left of H (D-B-H). All parts are consistent.

The Albanian name 'Mishtore' corresponds to 'Butcher'. The clue 'Mishtorja është pas ëmbëlsirës (J)' (Butcher is behind Confectionery). Interpreting 'pas' for horizontal relations as 'to the left of' in a reading order, Butcher (C) is to the left of Confectionery (J) (K-C-J). This is consistent.
The Albanian name 'Kishë' corresponds to 'Church'. It is mentioned in clues for 'Kafeneja' (D between F and A) and 'Bashkia e qytetit' (G between F and L). Both are consistent with F being Church.

The Albanian name 'Kopsht' corresponds to 'Garden'. The clue 'Kopsht është djathtas nga xhamia (L) dhe para maleve (M)' (Garden is to the right of Mosque and in front of Mountains). Garden (I) is to the right of L and below M. All parts are consistent.

The Albanian name 'Male' corresponds to 'Mountains'. It is mentioned in the clue for 'Kopsht': 'Kopsht (I) është ... para maleve (M)' (Garden is in front of Mountains). This means I is below M. This is consistent.

The Albanian name 'Floktor' corresponds to 'Barbershop'. It is mentioned in the problematic clue for 'Dhëmbëtari' (Dentist (H) is to the left of Barbershop (B)). As noted in C1_2, this contradicts the map's visual (H is right of B). However, 'Floktor' is listed as 'Barbershop (B)' and must be assigned. I assume the specific clause is an error in the problem description, and 'Floktor' is 'Barbershop (B)'.

The Albanian name 'Shesh lojërash' corresponds to 'Playground'. The clue 'Sheshi lojërash është djathtas nga ëmbëlsira (J)' (Playground is to the right of Confectionery). Playground (N) is to the right of J. This is consistent.

The Albanian name 'Dyqan' corresponds to 'Market'. The clue 'Dyqani është para dhëmbëtarit (H) dhe majtas nga mishtorja (C)' (Market is in front of Dentist and to the left of Butcher). Market (K) is below H, and K is to the left of C (K-C-J). All parts are consistent.

The Albanian name 'Varrezë' corresponds to 'Cemetery'. This name is not explicitly identified by a specific clue, but by process of elimination it is the only remaining Albanian name (13) and Cemetery (E, RIP icon) is the only remaining English translation/icon that fits its map position on Rruga e Durrësit.

The Albanian name 'Xhami' corresponds to 'Mosque'. It is mentioned in clues for 'Bashkia e qytetit' (G between F and L), 'Dhëmbëtari' (H below L), and 'Kopsht' (I right of L). All are consistent with L being Mosque.

1. Start at the corner of Rruga e Durrësit and Rruga I. Kadare (top-right). 
2. Go straight (west) on Rruga e Durrësit to the end of the street, passing L, G, F. 'Shkoni nëpër varrezën' (Go through Cemetery E). So, you are at Cemetery (E).
3. 'Kthehuni majtas në rrugën Fortuzi' (Turn left onto Rruga Fortuzi). To make subsequent instructions consistent: Turn left (south) onto Bulevard Nënë Tereza, then turn left (west) onto Rruga Fortuzi. You are now at Cafe (D), heading West on Rruga Fortuzi (H-B-D).
4. 'Kafeneja është vendi i parë në të djathtë' (Cafe is the first place on the right). This is consistent: D is the first building encountered heading west from Bulevard Nënë Tereza, and it's on your right.
5. 'Shkoni në vendin e tretë në të djathtë' (Go to the third place on the right). From Cafe (D), heading West: (D is 1st on right), Barbershop (B) is 2nd on right, Dentist (H) is 3rd on right. So, you are at Dentist (H), heading West.
6. 'Shkoni nëpër floktorin dhe kthehuni djathtas' (Go through Barbershop (B) and turn right). From Dentist (H), go back (east) through Barbershop (B). You are now at Barbershop (B), heading East. Turn right (south) onto the unnamed vertical street.
7. 'Shkoni në vendin e dytë në të djathtë' (Go to the second place on the right). On the vertical street, heading South: 1st on right is Market (K), 2nd on right is Butcher (C). So, you are at Butcher (C).
8. 'Kthehuni prapa dhe kaloni bulevardin Nënë Tereza' (Turn back and cross Bulevard Nënë Tereza). From Butcher (C), turn back (north) on the unnamed street. Turn left (west) onto Rruga Fortuzi and cross Bulevard Nënë Tereza. You are now in the empty lot west of Cafe (D), on Rruga Fortuzi.
9. 'Dyqani është vendi i parë në të djathtë' (Market is the first place on the right). From your current location, go south on Bulevard Nënë Tereza. Turn right (west) onto Rruga Vorpsi. Market (K) is the first building on the right. So, you are at Market (K), heading West on Rruga Vorpsi.
10. 'Floktori është vendi i dytë në të majtë' (Barbershop is the second place on the left). To reach Barbershop (B) and have it be the second on the left: From Market (K), turn back (east) on Rruga Vorpsi to Bulevard Nënë Tereza. Turn left (north) on Bulevard Nënë Tereza. Turn right (east) onto Rruga Fortuzi. Now on Rruga Fortuzi, heading East (D-B-H): Cafe (D) is 1st on left, Barbershop (B) is 2nd on left. So, you are at Barbershop (B), heading East.
11. 'Shkoni deri në fund të rrugës' (Go to the end of the street). From B, head East past Dentist (H) to the end of Rruga Fortuzi (intersection with Rruga I. Kadare).
12. 'Kthehuni djathtas' (Turn right). Turn right (south) onto Rruga I. Kadare. You are now on Rruga I. Kadare, heading South.

Final Question: 'what will be the first site (not considering empty lots) on your right that you come to?' As you head South on Rruga I. Kadare, the first street to your right (west) is Rruga Vorpsi. The first building on Rruga Vorpsi, closest to Rruga I. Kadare, is Confectionery (J).
